name: domain-whois-marketplace
description: Domain WHOIS & RDAP lookup tools for Claude Code — native protocols, IANA discovery, bulk checking.

plugins.name: domain-whois-mcp
plugins.description: Domain WHOIS & RDAP lookups via native protocols. Check availability, get registrar info, bulk check up to 50 domains concurrently, discover TLD infrastructure via IANA. 8 tools: whois_lookup, rdap_lookup, domain_check, bulk_domain_check, tld_info, whois_raw, find_whois_server, rdap_bootstrap_info. Zero API keys required.
